allow: Bash(python -c "import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen\('http://localhost:8000/'\); print\('Status:', r.status, '| Content-Type:', r.headers['Content-Type'], '| First bytes:', r.read\(\)[:50\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import socket; s=socket.socket\(\); r=s.connect_ex\(\('localhost',8000\)\); print\('Port 8000 open:', r==0\); s.close\(\)")
